<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-agent-ui-contract.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

Render a rich UI inline in the chat using shadcn-styled components. Pass a single
JSON object as the `spec` argument — the UI is rendered from that object as soon as
the tool call completes.

SPEC SHAPE (flat element tree):
{
  "root": "<rootKey>",
  "elements": {
    "<key>": { "type": "<Component>", "props": { ... }, "children": ["<childKey>", ...] },
    ...
  },
  "state": { ... optional initial state ... }
}
- "root" names the top element key. "elements" is a flat map keyed by string id.
- "children" is an array of element KEYS (references into "elements"), not nested objects.
- Only use component types from AVAILABLE COMPONENTS below.

DYNAMIC DATA & BINDING (optional):
- Read state into a prop: { "$state": "/path/to/value" } (RFC 6901 JSON Pointer, leading slash).
- Two-way bind an input: set its value/checked prop to { "$bindState": "/form/email" }.
- Repeat children over a state array: add a top-level "repeat" on an element —
  { "type": "Stack", "props": {}, "repeat": { "statePath": "/items", "key": "id" }, "children": ["row"] }.
  Inside repeated children read fields with { "$item": "field" } and the index with { "$index": true }.
- Seed any referenced state in the "state" object (e.g. "state": { "items": [...], "form": { "email": "" } }).

ACTIONS (optional):
- Buttons emit a "press" event; wire it via the element's "on" field:
  { "type": "Button", "props": { "label": "Add" }, "on": { "press": { "action": "pushState",
    "params": { "statePath": "/items", "value": { "id": "$id", "title": { "$state": "/draft" } } } } } }
- Built-in actions: setState { path, value }, pushState { statePath, value }, removeState { statePath, index }.

EXAMPLE spec:
{
  "root": "card",
  "elements": {
    "card": { "type": "Card", "props": { "title": "Deploy status" }, "children": ["body"] },
    "body": { "type": "Stack", "props": { "gap": "sm" }, "children": ["msg", "bar"] },
    "msg": { "type": "Text", "props": { "text": "Building…", "muted": true }, "children": [] },
    "bar": { "type": "Progress", "props": { "value": 60 }, "children": [] }
  }
}

Prefer this tool over ASCII tables or long markdown when showing structured data,
forms, metrics, or status. Keep specs focused; one coherent UI per call.

AVAILABLE COMPONENTS (20):
- Stack: { direction?: "row" | "column", gap?: "none" | "xs" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl", align?: "start" | "center" | "end" | "stretch", justify?: "start" | "center" | "end" | "between" | "around", wrap?: boolean } - Vertical or horizontal flex container. The primary layout primitive. [accepts children]
- Grid: { columns?: number, gap?: "none" | "xs" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl" } - Responsive equal-column grid. [accepts children]
- Card: { title?: string, description?: string } - Bordered surface with an optional title/description header. Group related content. [accepts children]
- Separator: { orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical" } - A thin dividing line.
- Heading: { text: string, level?: number } - A section heading.
- Text: { text: string, muted?: boolean, size?: "xs" | "sm" | "base" | "lg", weight?: "normal" | "medium" | "semibold" | "bold" } - A paragraph or inline run of text.
- Link: { text: string, href: string } - A hyperlink. Opens in a new tab.
- Image: { src: string, alt?: string, rounded?: boolean } - An image.
- Avatar: { src?: string, alt?: string, fallback?: string } - A circular user/avatar image with initials fallback.
- Badge: { text: string, variant?: "default" | "secondary" | "outline" | "destructive" } - A small status/label pill.
- Alert: { title?: string, description?: string, variant?: "default" | "destructive" } - A callout box for important information or errors.
- Table: { columns: Array<string>, rows: Array<Array<string>> } - A simple data table from columns + rows.
- Progress: { value: number, label?: string } - A horizontal progress bar.
- Skeleton: { width?: string, height?: string } - A loading placeholder block.
- Button: { label: string, variant?: "default" | "secondary" | "outline" | "ghost" | "destructive" | "link", size?: "sm" | "default" | "lg", disabled?: boolean } - A clickable button. Attach an action with the element's `on.press` to mutate state (e.g. { action: 'setState', params: { path, value } }).
- Input: { placeholder?: string, value?: string, label?: string, type?: "text" | "email" | "password" | "number" } - A single-line text field. Two-way bind `value` to state via { $bindState: 'form.field' }.
- Textarea: { placeholder?: string, value?: string, label?: string, rows?: number } - A multi-line text field. Two-way bind `value` to state.
- Checkbox: { label?: string, checked?: boolean } - A boolean checkbox. Two-way bind `checked` to state.
- Switch: { label?: string, checked?: boolean } - A boolean toggle switch. Two-way bind `checked` to state.
- Select: { placeholder?: string, value?: string, options: Array<{ label: string, value: string }> } - A dropdown select. Provide `options` as { label, value }[] and two-way bind `value` to state.
